channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish, 20th April
item.description:
Fly tipped rubbish, set on fire LFB Attended

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 163, Star Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grafiti on top AND side of street cabinet, 20th April
item.description:
North of the bus stop outside Hanover court, on Anerley Road. On top AND side of street cabinet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 20th April
item.description:
The usual spot in Eversley Cross has produced some rubbish bags and other bits. It's been moved to one spot to stop it being scattered. For your reference, I'd say it is a P1 but things left there tend to get scattered by kids etc

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eversley Cross, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grafiti on wall, 20th April
item.description:
Black graffiti on grey breeze blocks, on boundary wall on pavement around # 30 Belvedere Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Belvedere Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Packing materials on estate green space, 20th April
item.description:
This area is on Reeves Rd just round the block from Herbert Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ripon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Packing materials on estate green space, 20th April
item.description:
This area is on Reeves Rd just round the block from Herbert Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ripon Road, Plumstead

item.title: Graffiti on multiple sides of street cabinet, 20th April
item.description:
Street cabinet has graffiti on multiple sides

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 94, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti on small wall, 20th April
item.description:

item.title: Fly Tipping again!, 20th April
item.description:
Most everyday someone fly tipping on same place.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London

item.title: Sofa dumped on junction of Waldegrave Road with Belvedere Road, 20th April
item.description:
Black sofa dumped here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waldegrave Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A black bin bag of residential waste was left on our property, 20th April
item.description:
A black bin bag of residential waste was left on our property and was spread over the car park as it contained food waste.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 174, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Request to have street sign moved o/s 25A Oakwood Dr, 20th April
item.description:
Request to have street sign moved o/s 25A Oakwood Dr, B'Heath....caller has got double yellow lines outside his house and people are parking on these, making it awkward for him to get on and off d/way.....because the street sign is there
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oakwood Drive, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dirty double bed mattress was left against our office front., 20th April
item.description:
The mattress is flithy and poses a threat to health and public safety. we discovered it this morning and must have been dumped over night. we request its removal as soon as possible.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackstock Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clothes collection blocks pavement, 20th April
item.description:
See photographs

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 104-108, Tower Bridge Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle has been abandoned., 20th April
item.description:
Grey Mercedes Benz has been abandoned. Not parked on curb. Causing an obstruction. MOT expired April 9, 2026. Untaxed (due October 31st, 2035). Left unlocked. No on has returned. Has been there for over 72hrs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Manor Park, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 20th April
item.description:
Fly tipped waste on the footpath between Plumstead Rd and Duke of Wellington Avenue (closer to the Plumstead Rd end)

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very large cable box … probably hit by a vehicle, 20th April
item.description:
Pavement blocked and exposed electrical wires facing the road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): New North Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ditch on side of the road, 20th April
item.description:
Large muddy ditch is causing a danger to vehicles.

Report on FixMyStreet
